entries.title: Gojo And Sukuna Open The Endgame Duel

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen Shinjuku Showdown through chapter 271 manga aftermath.

content.fact: The Shinjuku Showdown opens with Gojo directly fighting Sukuna in Megumi's body, making the duel both a power-system climax and a rescue-state problem.
content.injection: During the opening Shinjuku duel, keep Gojo versus Sukuna centered while preserving Megumi's body as part of the stakes.
constraints: Do not reveal Gojo's fate before the Gojo falls anchor.
antiLore: Do not write the opening duel as detached from Megumi's vessel state.

sourceInfo.title: Shinjuku Showdown
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Domain And Adaptation Define The First Phase

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen Shinjuku Showdown through chapter 271 manga aftermath.

content.fact: The first Gojo/Sukuna phase is defined by domain clashes, adaptation pressure, and high-level counterplay rather than a simple exchange of attacks.
content.injection: During the domain/adaptation phase, keep battle logic precise: domain conditions, adaptation, and counterplay drive the stakes.
constraints: Do not reduce this phase to raw power comparison.
antiLore: Do not ignore Mahoraga adaptation as a central pressure in the Gojo/Sukuna fight.

sourceInfo.title: Shinjuku Showdown
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Gojo's Fall Changes Plan And Morale

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen Shinjuku Showdown through chapter 271 manga aftermath.

content.fact: Gojo's fall changes the final battle from a duel into a sequence of allied plans against a still-active Sukuna.
content.injection: After Gojo falls, write the allies' morale and tactics around the loss of their strongest fighter and the need to keep rotating plans alive.
constraints: Before this anchor, do not reveal Gojo's final Shinjuku fate.
antiLore: Do not let Gojo keep actively solving post-fall Shinjuku scenes.

sourceInfo.title: Shinjuku Showdown
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Kashimo Enters After Gojo

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen Shinjuku Showdown through chapter 271 manga aftermath.

content.fact: After Gojo falls, Kashimo enters the Shinjuku fight as the next challenger against Sukuna.
content.injection: In the immediate post-Gojo window, use Kashimo as the next pressure point before the broader allied rotation fully takes over.
constraints: Keep Kashimo's earlier Culling Game role in the Colonies deck.
antiLore: Do not make Kashimo part of the opening Gojo/Sukuna duel.

sourceInfo.title: Shinjuku Showdown
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.
